# @vllnt/convex-analytics

> A generic, configurable, embedded analytics component for Convex — any event, any dimension, any domain — with rollup-on-write so reads stay O(1). Mount via `app.use()` in any Convex app.

The component owns a standardized, typed schema (events, rollups, subjects, sessions,
config); host data enters only as opaque refs (`subjectRef`, `sessionRef`) and host-typed
scalar `props` — never `v.any()`. Host-declared `dimensions` drive rollup-on-write; the verb
set (`metric`, `top`, `timeseries`, `uniques`, `funnel`, `retention`, `list`) is generic. Web
analytics is the opt-in `@vllnt/convex-analytics/web` preset; reactive hooks ship as the
optional `@vllnt/convex-analytics/react` entry. Peer dependency: `convex@>=1.21.0` (optional;
`react@>=18` optional for the `./react` entry).

## Docs

- [Quick Start](docs/quick-start.md): Install, mount, track, read
- [Client SDK](docs/client-sdk.md): `AnalyticsClient<TProps>` config, verbs, types
- [Schema](docs/schema.md): events, rollups, subjects, sessions, config + indexes
- [REST API](docs/api-reference.md): the five generic routes (/track, /metric, /top, /timeseries, /uniques)
- [Web Preset](docs/web-preset.md): opt-in web dimensions + UA/geo helpers + React note
- [Multi-Product](docs/multi-product.md): the opaque `scope` partition
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): rollup-on-write, child components, crons
- [MCP Tools](docs/mcp-tools.md): 7 tools for AI-native queries

## Examples

- [Demo app](demo/convex/example.ts): mount + client + track + read in a host harness
